name: Pharrell Williams
bio: Pharrell Williams earns across multiple layers of the music business as a performer, songwriter, producer, and catalog stakeholder.
notable_for: Crossover hitmaking, production work, and songwriting-driven economics.
career_highlight: A mix of solo hits and deep producer-writer participation gives his catalog more resilient economics than performer-only pop catalogs.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from performer income, producer/songwriter catalog depth, publishing participation, and durable sync-friendly pop records.

ownership.master_owner: Mixed performer, producer, and label-side master economics across projects
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing and producer-side participation appear especially important to retained value
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Producer/songwriter economics mean artist-side value can extend beyond Pharrell-billed solo tracks.
